nodes.name: Hypothesis engine calls removed from argu_god
nodes.premise: Functions save_debate_session, load_debate_session, create_belief_hypothesis, add_belief_evidence, emit_debate_event and friends were removed from the argu_god module because no consumer used their output.
evidence: No call sites found for integration functions
Session persistence produced no visible effect on debate flow

nodes.name: No consumer exists for argu_god integration output
nodes.premise: At the time of the refactoring, nothing downstream consumed the hypothesis tracking, session persistence, or event timeline produced by argu_god's integration layer.
evidence: No downstream system read session history

nodes.name: kernel_bridge.py relocated to sub-agents/debate_agent.py
nodes.premise: The three bridge functions (emit_belief_signal, emit_confidence_signal, emit_contradiction_signal) were moved from modules/argu_god/engine/kernel_bridge.py to sub-agents/debate_agent.py because kernel_bridge was a thin shim calling signal_extractor with a hardcoded unit ID.

nodes.name: debate_agent.py exists in sub-agents/
nodes.premise: The sub-agents/debate_agent.py file was created as the canonical location for debate agent bridge functions imported by the argu_god module.

nodes.name: vector_store.index_graph consolidated into _populate_semantic_memory
nodes.premise: Two separate indexing steps for the same graph.json data were consolidated — _populate_semantic_memory in debate.py now calls vector_store.index_graph internally instead of requiring a separate call in debate_step.

nodes.name: analyzer.py deleted from argu_god
nodes.premise: The file modules/argu_god/engine/analyzer.py (28 LOC) was deleted because debate.py no longer called from .analyzer import detect_contradictions after contradiction detection was generalized into kernel/patterns/contradiction_detector.py.
evidence: No imports of .analyzer remain in debate.py
Contradiction detection happens via kernel path

nodes.name: Magic numbers centralized to kernel/config/kernel_config.py
nodes.premise: Hardcoded TTLs (7200, 14400, 3600), importance/confidence defaults (0.9), and confidence nudges (0.05) were extracted from belief_signal_handler.py and hypothesis_engine.py into a centralized config module.
examples: handle_belief_shift_signal now uses BELIEF_SHIFT_TTL instead of 7200

nodes.name: sentence_transformers graceful import fallback
nodes.premise: ChromaBackend._get_model() in semantic_retriever.py now wraps the sentence_transformers import in try/except ImportError with a descriptive error message pointing to the missing dependency.
evidence: Error message tells user to pip install sentence-transformers

nodes.name: SQLite was additive before migration
nodes.premise: SQLite logging and persistence was initially added alongside existing JSON file writes. The use_sqlite=True flag existed but defaulted to False, keeping JSON as the primary persistence path. This state was intentionally temporary — the plan was always to commit to SQLite as sole backend.
evidence: JSON files were the primary persistence

nodes.name: SQLite made sole persistence backend
nodes.premise: SQLite was made the sole backend — memory_engine.save_object no longer writes JSON files. All persistence goes through kernel.persistence.db.KernelDB with a generic_memory catch-all table for episodic signals/events and future types. The use_sqlite parameter and storage/unit_storage write_json/read_json imports were removed from memory_engine. Memory directories in kernel/utils/paths.py were cleaned up.
evidence: memory_engine.py no longer imports from storage.unit_storage
examples: save_signal writes to generic_memory (no JSON file)
load_node_from_disk reads from generic_memory (no JSON file)

nodes.name: JSON file paths removed from kernel
nodes.premise: The memory directory structure in kernel/utils/paths.py (WORKING_MEMORY_DIR, EPISODIC_MEMORY_DIR, SEMANTIC_MEMORY_DIR, etc.) and get_memory_path were removed since nothing writes JSON files anymore.
evidence: paths.py no longer defines memory directory constants
DEFAULT_DIRS no longer includes memory directories

nodes.name: Contradiction detection generalized to semantic_memory
nodes.premise: Contradiction detection was rebuilt in kernel/patterns/contradiction_detector.py using semantic_memory edges with relation_type == contradicts instead of the old debate-specific graph.json refutes edges.
evidence: detect_contradictions_for_beliefs accepts beliefs dict and resolves to node IDs
